ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Collection of functions to enhance 'ggplot2' and 'ggiraph'. Provides functions for exploratory plots. All plot can be a 'static' plot or an 'interactive' plot using 'ggiraph'.
Collection of functions to enhance 'ggplot2' and 'ggiraph'. Provides functions for exploratory plots. All plot can be a 'static' plot or an 'interactive' plot using 'ggiraph'.

name: r-ggiraphextra
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '0.3.0' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-ggiraphextra
  version: "{{ version|replace('-', '_') }}"

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/ggiraphExtra_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/ggiraphExtra/ggiraphExtra_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 338b1de317c32e1e46434b68f748cfa8bf833735fc725de1bd30c4c27bbc1761

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-rcolorbrewer
    - r-dplyr
    - r-ggiraph >=0.3.2
    - r-ggplot2 >=2.2.0
    - r-magrittr
    - r-mgcv
    - r-mycor
    - r-plyr
    - r-ppcor
    - r-purrr
    - r-reshape2
    - r-scales
    - r-sjlabelled
    - r-sjmisc
    - r-stringr
    - r-tidyr
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-rcolorbrewer
    - r-dplyr
    - r-ggiraph >=0.3.2
    - r-ggplot2 >=2.2.0
    - r-magrittr
    - r-mgcv
    - r-mycor
    - r-plyr
    - r-ppcor
    - r-purrr
    - r-reshape2
    - r-scales
    - r-sjlabelled
    - r-sjmisc
    - r-stringr
    - r-tidyr

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('ggiraphExtra')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('ggiraphExtra')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://github.com/cardiomoon/ggiraphExtra
  license: GPL-3.0-only
  summary: Collection of functions to enhance 'ggplot2' and 'ggiraph'. Provides functions for
    exploratory plots. All plot can be a 'static' plot or an 'interactive' plot using
    'ggiraph'.
  license_family: GPL3
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-3'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r

# Package: ggiraphExtra
# Type: Package
# Title: Make Interactive 'ggplot2'. Extension to 'ggplot2' and 'ggiraph'
# Version: 0.3.0
# Authors@R: person("Keon-Woong", "Moon", email = "cardiomoon@gmail.com", role = c("aut", "cre"))
# Maintainer: Keon-Woong Moon <cardiomoon@gmail.com>
# URL: https://github.com/cardiomoon/ggiraphExtra
# Depends: R (>= 2.10)
# Imports: ggplot2 (>= 2.2.0), ggiraph (>= 0.3.2), scales, reshape2, plyr, mycor, ppcor, grid, mgcv, sjlabelled, sjmisc, stringr, tidyr, purrr, dplyr, magrittr, RColorBrewer
# Suggests: TH.data, ggforce, webshot, ztable, moonBook, maps, gcookbook, knitr, rmarkdown, testthat
# Description: Collection of functions to enhance 'ggplot2' and 'ggiraph'. Provides functions for exploratory plots. All plot can be a 'static' plot or an 'interactive' plot using 'ggiraph'.
# License: GPL-3
# Encoding: UTF-8
# LazyData: true
# RoxygenNote: 7.1.1
# VignetteBuilder: knitr
# NeedsCompilation: no
# Packaged: 2020-10-06 06:38:43 UTC; cardiomoon
# Author: Keon-Woong Moon [aut, cre]
# Repository: CRAN
# Date/Publication: 2020-10-06 07:00:02 UTC
